calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-02-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Daniel P. Iannitelli, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Bety Soto, sworn and examined through Court Spanish Interpreter Shannon Raintree.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Heval, Inc. DBA Park Gyros and Ali Valdiz.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Bety Soto and against Defendants Heval, Inc. DBA Park Gyros and Ali Valdiz as follows:

Principal $97,238.88
Pre-Judgment Interest $27,252.72
Attorney's Fees $6750.00
Costs $450.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $131,691.60
Judgment signed in open court.
